perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene is live-action. Two young women stand in a warehouse aisle; the woman on the left wears a patterned bucket hat and a white top, and the woman on the right wears a black beret and a brown top. They are holding three large animal-shaped plush pillows (a white bear, a pink hippo, and a green crocodile) and smiling at the camera. (2) They move the pillows closer to the camera, showcasing the quilted texture and patterns. They gesture towards the items as if explaining their features. (3) The woman on the right takes the crocodile pillow and playfully hits the woman on the left with it; they both laugh and continue to pose with the products against the background of high storage shelves.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female voice narrating enthusiastically over upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop background music. (2) As the narration continues, faint ambient warehouse noise and the rustling of fabric can be heard. (3) During the playful interaction, cartoonish sound effects (SFX) such as 'boing' and comic hitting sounds are layered over the voices, which become more laughing and informal. The music maintains a constant volume throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. Decorative Text: '鱷魚 超好看' (Crocodile looks great) and '最便宜的動物涼感抱枕' (Cheapest animal cooling pillows) serve as hooks. (2) Functional Text: '最新出的動物造型 好可愛唷' (New animal shapes, so cute) and '這個只要439元' (This only costs 439 yuan). (3) Functional Text: Specific labels for '河馬' (Hippo), '熊' (Bear), and '鱷魚' (Crocodile) appear. (4) Decorative Text: '高度60公分' (Height 60 cm) and '價格划算' (Good price), ending with a humorous caption '還可以拿來毆打你' (Can also be used to hit you).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Demonstration -> Humorous Interaction

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters, 2 blurred shoppers in the background (1 male, 1 female).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with a bucket hat and white tank top, the other with a black beret and brown long-sleeve top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: High-density warehouse storage shelves filled with various consumer goods, typical of a Costco interior.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific seasonal product (cooling animal pillows) at Costco. The video uses energetic delivery and visual demonstrations of the product's variety and soft texture to appeal to shoppers looking for value and cute home goods.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the Costco logo and direct price/product information provided by the presenters.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style captions and playful interaction between presenters.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'cooling' descriptors suggests this is a summer-specific marketing effort targeting casual retail consumers.
